strategy.description: Reduce position sizes. Prefer mean-reversion and range-bound strategies. Be very selective — quality over quantity.

picks.name: Prudential Financial, Inc.
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 9.4x, forward P/E of 6.1x (indicating earnings acceleration), P/B of 1.01x, well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 31% year-over-year. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Rsi at 32 indicates oversold conditions — contrarian buying opportunity, and RSI bullish divergence detected, suggesting downside momentum is fading while the price prepares for a reversal. Risk/reward: Entry zone $92.00–$95.92 with a target of $108.59 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $89.01 (-5.7% risk), yielding a 2.6:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.

picks.name: Newmont Corporation
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 17.4x, forward P/E of 9.8x (indicating earnings acceleration), well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 21% year-over-year, profit margins of 31% demonstrating operational efficiency. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Price remains above the 200-day moving average, confirming the long-term structural uptrend is intact, and pulled back below the 50-day SMA while the 200-day uptrend remains intact — a potential mean-reversion entry opportunity, RSI at 30 indicates oversold conditions — contrarian buying opportunity. Risk/reward: Entry zone $109.58–$113.87 with a target of $127.90 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $104.27 (-6.2% risk), yielding a 2.4:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.
